data.content:
# Implementation Plan: Acceptance Criteria Column

## Analysis
The active items overview table renders columns via getBeatColumns() in beat-columns.tsx. Current active-view column order: select, id, priority, profile, ownerType, state, agent columns. The Beat type already has an acceptance?: string field (types.ts:68).

## Steps
1. Define acceptanceColumn() in beat-column-defs.tsx — header "Acceptance criteria", accessor: acceptance, truncated text, ~20-25% width
2. Export and import in beat-columns.tsx
3. Insert at position index 2 (after select + id) in getBeatColumns()
4. Run lint, typecheck, build to verify

## Complexity: Low
## Risks: Table crowding on small viewports (mitigated by truncation)
## Test Strategy: Playwright or manual column position verification
